payload.title: Financial Performance Report
payload.description: MTA Finance Committee Financial Performance Report for July 28, 2025, covering YTD June 2025 financial results including operating revenue, subsidies, expenses, debt service, ridership metrics, positions, and farebox operating ratios.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Preliminary financial results subject to revision

payload.gap_text: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited.
payload.description: Financial results are based on preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review, audit, and adjustment. Current month actuals exclude post-close adjustments.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited.

payload.claim_text: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited. Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.statement: Financial results for YTD June 2025 are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review, audit, and adjustment.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited.
Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: Methodology note on farebox operating ratios

payload.claim_text: In the agenda materials for the Metro-North/Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting, farebox operating ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis, and differ from the statistics presented in this table.
payload.statement: Farebox operating ratios for LIRR and MNR in this report use a different methodology than those in the Metro-North/LIRR Committee meeting materials.

evidence_refs.source_quote: In the agenda materials for the Metro-North/Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting, farebox operating ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis, and differ from the statistics presented in this table.

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.
